title: JumpPad
description: A simple plugin to turn pressure plates into jump pads, with added customizability (1.21 native)
body: This plugin allow you to turn any pressure plate into a "Jump Pad", which, if the player steps on, they will be propelled in a specified direction. Here's how the commands work: /jumppad set - Sets the multiplier or value for either X or Y. X will multiply the velocity of the player in the X and Z directions by itself, and Y will set the Y velocity to itself. X and Y must be valid numbers. Examples: /jumppad set x 2 /jumppad set y 1.5 /jumppad whitelist - All commands to do with the whitelist mode. The whitelist mode means that only pressure plates that you specify will be converted to jump pads. Subcommands: add - Adds the pressure plate that you are looking at to the whitelist remove - Removes the pressure plate you are looking at from the whitelist enable - Enables the whitelist and disables the blacklist info - Tells you whether the pressure plate you are looking at is in the whitelist /jumppad blacklist - All commands to do with the blacklist mode. The blacklist mode means that all pressure plates are considered to be jump pads, unless you specifically exclude them by adding them to the blacklist. Subcommands: add - Adds the pressure plate that you are looking at to the blacklist remove - Removes the pressure plate you are looking at from the blacklist enable - Enables the blacklist and disables the whitelist info - Tells you whether the pressure plate you are looking at is in the blacklist /jumppad delete - Deletes all data associated with the pressure plate you are looking at. This will remove it from the whitelist and the blacklist, and remove its data set with /jumppad set. /jumppad info - Tells you what properties you gave the pressure plate you are looking at with /jumppad set. If you didn't set anything custom for that pressure plate, it'll just return that both X and Y are 1. Only players with the jumppad.manage permission can use this command. By default, only server operators have this permission. Only players with the jumppad.use permission can use the jump pads. By default, everyone has this permission. I'll be making a video tutorial on this soon. If you have any issues, let me know on Github. ### bStats This plugin collects data on its usage using bStats, which is a common practice for plugins. However, you can opt out of this data collection by setting enabled to false in bStats/config.yml in the plugins folder. ### Example If you would like to see an example of this plugin being used, check out my own server, AlcMC. Java: IP: alc-mc.com Bedrock: IP:Port - alc-mc.com:19132 Add AlcMCJoiner as an XBOX Live friend to join on console. ### Server Hosting Need a host for your Minecraft Server? Why not try Apex Hosting?
